name: aa-annotate
description: Launch a Windows annotation overlay so users can mark screenshots and return a review handoff to Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Collect visual screenshot annotations from users
interface.longDescription: AA Annotate lets Codex start a small Windows overlay, wait while the user captures and annotates one or more screenshots, and continue from the generated review handoff.
defaultPrompt: Ask me to annotate what matters on screen
